subject: I am writing to ask you to donate before Trump comes to Colorado next week (this is really important)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:

#
Hello, In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign before tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important, especially with Trump visiting Colorado next week. Thanks in advance. After this deadline expires at midnight, our leadership team will take a hard look at our budget tomorrow morning. We're expecting Donald Trump and his Republican allies to come after our campaign hard next week -- mainly as a thank you to Cory Gardner for voting to acquit the president this month. **How much we raise (and from how many grassroots donors) is going to determine whether or not we have the resources to be prepared for whatever Trump has planned for us.** We cannot afford to fall behind. Not with Trump inserting himself into our race, which is why I'm asking you to step up today: **Can you make a donation of $10 or more before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? Every dollar will support our team 's work to win this race and counter whatever Trump throws at our campaign next week. Look, I know we're all focused on the Democratic presidential primary and what will shake out in the coming weeks, but I want you to know that my attention is just as focused on the people of Minnesota and our re-election campaign.

**Why? Because it won't be enough to win the White House if we don't win the Senate in November.**

Any progress a Democratic president hopes to make will be blocked every step of the way so long as Mitch McConnell remains in power.

If we want to tackle the issues that matter most to everyday families, we must end the GOP's stranglehold on the majority -- and step one in our fight will be saving Minnesota's Senate seat.

name: Rena Moran
subject: I am the great-great-granddaughter of a slave
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6Sx-5auMsHAmn25-k_XyHoD_b40fTeQp5dAhL7yIPGE=/i6dr-OkcN_F5eZO89vjgr6UV6g2_5hXBD4y2aW9Palo=?refcode=021620)
| | Friend, My name is Rena Moran. I am a state representative from St. Paul. I am the great-great-granddaughter of a slave. In honor of Black History Month, it is important to honor who we are, where we come from, where we are, and where we are going. The long arc of the law should bend towards justice, but it is nowhere near immediate. I mention that because we know laws are not always created fair and just and we know that laws do not always represent everyone in the same way. I am sure my ancestors before me never would have dreamed that one day their descendant would serve in elected office. Every day I am proud to represent the people of my district, and my ancestors, at the Capitol. The truth of the matter is that we can never come with our whole selves but someday, and bit by bit, I hope to one day have a state where everyone is treated fairly, no matter the color of their skin. This Black History Month, I am reflecting on the great contributions of African Americans, where we are, where we need to be, and how important it is for all of us to do our part to make our communities and our state more fair and more just. Thank you, **Rep. Rena Moran **(DFL - St. Paul) Chair, Health and Human Services Policy Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6Sx-5auMsHAmn25-k_XyHoD_b40fTeQp5dAhL7yIPGE=/i6dr-OkcN_F5eZO89vjgr6UV6g2_5hXBD4y2aW9Palo=?refcode=021620-Moran)

clean_body: The DSCC’s heavy-handed tactics have opened up an opportunity for us to grow our campaign in a BIG way. Here’s the situation: First, the bad news: Late last week, the DSCC put its thumb on the scales of our primary here in Kentucky by endorsing our opponent. Now, the good news: As soon as the DSCC news came out, we’ve seen a big surge in online fundraising and people joining our campaign. Kentucky wants a primary, not a coronation. Voters are sick and tired of these kinds of moves. And the DSCC’s heavy-handed tactics have opened up an opportunity for us to grow our campaign in a BIG way. But, we really need your help to capitalize on this moment in the press, on social media, and in communities across the commonwealth. = = There are millions of people out there who are frustrated by the party bosses trying to influence the outcomes in our Democratic primaries. We know Kentuckians are looking for change, not the same old, same old establishment politics from Washington, D.C. Your donations help us reach people through organizing, advertising, and the media. = The outpouring of support since the DSCC’s big decision has energized our entire campaign. If we keep up this momentum, we will not only win this primary, but defeat Mitch McConnell in November. \- Team Booker = | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Will you donate $10 to help us send mailers to those voters? (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=31a81c40d4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_16_04_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-31a81c40d4-32267927)

The Trump administration's new budget takes aim at Social Security.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f3ed96cf75f64712bf2ef23e135339c6&_e=xDPJXMRq38WPRM7ptIOc8cBHMgdBwbJJ-_t990fnU8-R6sO2GtIlrDpl5stYauCPAYBD1_NNKBaHG7FzzNxjJbPNgX70-Cj5pU36ChI2_axyvya-CbMeW8ZuyQMMC8vItJODecWdBnogNCNf6cQwhNth36GdbgV3oD4C4nuDfUyo1FKmwxLxVbdB7RGik16Ubwam6DYt-Cs1UT1bnSO_PS7PKNbzdNV7HVy-eKbQkTTJeX0JkDeY3flhv3g1dyg2q4KLHnb9d1iI0MNJg6I_daPfv1xFaNsB7WxMChhwzw2BWm3djDjwK5agBTHURgYaAjobLO0V3WJQb-wGtsC69wbv40UOwAwQhdPEe4p6kgOy3gnST2aqj0HxAbMhFfPu7JwVJzKrgv82DTbrPCjAHw%3D%3D) **February 4, 2020:** President Trump says, "We will always protect your Medicare and we will always protect your Social Security. Always." **February 10, 2020:** Trump releases a budget that has cuts to Social Security. Scared about the future of Social Security? With this administration in power, you should be. Treasury Secretary Steve Mnuchin said on Capitol Hill this week, "it's not a cut, it's a reduction in the rate of increase." Who do they think they're fooling? **Mike will guarantee America's hard working seniors the dignity they deserve in retirement.** Mike is a businessman who knows and understands the numbers and facts around Social Security. He will strengthen Social Security's long-term finances while maintaining and enhancing benefits -- to ensure that no American senior has to live in financial distress. He'll also make it possible for millions of others to save for retirement. [**Add your name if you agree: We need to protect and strengthen Social Security, not make "reductions"!**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f3ed96cf75f64712bf2ef23e135339c6&_e=xDPJXMRq38WPRM7ptIOc8cBHMgdBwbJJ-_t990fnU8-R6sO2GtIlrDpl5stYauCPAYBD1_NNKBaHG7FzzNxjJbPNgX70-Cj5pU36ChI2_axyvya-CbMeW8ZuyQMMC8vItJODecWdBnogNCNf6cQwhNth36GdbgV3oD4C4nuDfUyo1FKmwxLxVbdB7RGik16UFX5H7_kgOt-fm9qGezNGmXwHX_I1nKG2qtR2tfjbPTRH1gYIT3oquTwFQl5mklFjv-k0JBUw5WfeI-aUpbTuD-DE5KugbT3hn5e5c3Bm0k8OuZ6Eu37bIVV1Olsux-3btKQuKuNnC97eAle_ztdkx-wSFU7mzVA1-K0lukeeDHRQQEDMMGCvBbUb1KnY4DDrNFWalCAt_-869FjXpdr91Q%3D%3D) | [ACT NOW »](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f3ed96cf75f64712bf2ef23e135339c6&_e=xDPJXMRq38WPRM7ptIOc8cBHMgdBwbJJ-_t990fnU8-R6sO2GtIlrDpl5stYauCPAYBD1_NNKBaHG7FzzNxjJbPNgX70-Cj5pU36ChI2_axyvya-CbMeW8ZuyQMMC8vItJODecWdBnogNCNf6cQwhNth36GdbgV3oD4C4nuDfUyo1FKmwxLxVbdB7RGik16UMw8W13x_3b7V5Wbm28OzglibDEPQXp7a7lOiCDilePzh2ACe2eDlGisGz68ahyi-QYym2KvQnImEgD-d-DAk6KYoBsihnpRafO1q4uwglgEjfdoHCqqN3lGh2C5y0vRkVTArfPgub_xIFfEloYKTzT5uutsrWcoYvD7PE-3zN-Q01AL9vixfjffNPxBnHHof19lclRTyx9pvJkZvLakH-g%3D%3D)

body:
With just over 100 days to go until the election, it's time to get actively involved in the future of Iowa and our country.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489
Hello

Over 80% of Americans want term limits. Think about that: 80%. You can't get 80% of people in a room to agree on the temperature of the thermostat. WHY can't we pass something that 260 million people want passed? Because politicians don't care about us, they care about their careers.

I'm counting on your help to change DC by sending someone like you, your neighbor
—someone who cares more about our country than moving to the next taxpayer job—to Congress. I'm committed to serving five terms and coming home. How do you know I'll do what I say? Because it's who I am and I'm guessing it's who you are also. As Iowans, integrity is important to us.

On Friday, the news out of DC was discouraging once again as the DOJ decided not to charge Andrew McCabe with a crime. The Inspector General said he lied under oath. Would any one of us get a pass for lying under oath? I doubt it. Why do politicians and bureaucrats continually get by with breaking the law. The answer is simple, we let them.

Together, we can make a difference. I need your help TODAY. Email us right now at volunteer@richardsforcongress.com (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=5ebbc50553&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489) . Don't wait until after dinner.

Get your friends involved, like and share our Facebook page, make calls, knock doors, put up signs, and yes make a contribution. Anything you can do to help will make a difference.
HOST A GATHERING (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489)
KNOCK DOORS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489)

Your neighbor,

Our grassroots campaign is taking our efforts to the next level to return power in Washington back to the everyday Iowan.

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-talks-affirming-life-fixing-healthcare-and-standing-up-to-iran-with-caffeinated-thoughts/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=20ec98f3aa-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-20ec98f3aa-25822489

clean_body: With just over 100 days to go until the election, it's time to get actively involved in the future of Iowa and our country. Hello Over 80% of Americans want term limits. Think about that: 80%. You can't get 80% of people in a room to agree on the temperature of the thermostat. WHY can't we pass something that 260 million people want passed? Because politicians don't care about us, they care about their careers. I'm counting on your help to change DC by sending someone like you, your neighbor —someone who cares more about our country than moving to the next taxpayer job—to Congress. I'm committed to serving five terms and coming home. How do you know I'll do what I say? Because it's who I am and I'm guessing it's who you are also. As Iowans, integrity is important to us. On Friday, the news out of DC was discouraging once again as the DOJ decided not to charge Andrew McCabe with a crime. The Inspector General said he lied under oath. Wilmot Collins

| | At every turn, Attorney General William Barr has abdicated his responsibility to this country. He has been complicit in this president's lawlessness. **Plain and simple: William Barr must resign. ** Barr's list of malpractice is long, but nothing is more damning than what happened this week. Acting as a political puppet for the president, Barr intervened in the case of Roger Stone - a Trump ally who has been convicted of many felonies - calling for prosecutors to shorten his sentence. In the face of blatant corruption, most prosecutors withdrew from the case, knowing that the fix was in. **No one should disrespect our institutions the way William Barr has, let alone the Attorney General of the United States.** No official who is willing to be complicit in the crimes of the president, or willing to make it easier for the president to commit corrupt offenses should hold power. That's not how our institutions are supposed to work. No more lawlessness in this country. We must hold those in power accountable.
